pr_title: fix: remove bracket placeholders and fragile English-only validator
pr_description: Replace `[Tension A]`/`[Tension B]`/`[specific factor]` bracket placeholders in `review_lever` field descriptions and system prompt constant with concrete literal examples Replace `check_review_format` English keyword checks (`"Controls"`, `"Weakness:"`, `"versus"/"vs."`) with structural validation (min length 20 chars, reject square brackets) Align `summary` field description with prompt_4 format (one sentence prescribing a concrete addition)
